topStories.title: MEA denies Elon Musk joined Modi-Trump call regarding West Asia war, refutes New York Times report
topStories.description: India's MEA confirmed that Prime Minister Modi and US President Trump had a private call, refuting claims of Elon Musk's participation. They discussed the West Asia conflict and the importance of the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: US-Iran war: Kuwait International Airport hit by drone attacks, radar system severely damaged
topStories.description: Kuwait International Airport faced multiple drone attacks on Saturday, which damaged its radar system. No casualties occurred, but the incident follows a previous attack on 25 March. Shuwaikh Port also sustained damage from a drone strike, impacting the country's trade operations.

topStories.title: 'Epstein Island' replaces White House name on Android, Google blames fake Maps edit
